description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Designed for the denim fan, this T-shirt from locomotive is crafted from soft cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
